Thanks. To recap, revenue rose last quarter, but the south region is still in decline.
So, if I understand you correctly, the trend is positive overall, but the south is the real risk?
Exactly. I would argue we should pause the south and invest in the premium segment.

Good morning, everyone, and thanks for joining. Before we start, let me set the agenda. We have three items today. First, a quick recap of last week, when we agreed to review the south region. Second, the quarterly numbers from Carlos. And third, the next steps for the digital project. I want us to align on one clear decision by the end, so please keep your points short. The main takeaway from last week was simple: we move fast on the premium segment. Carlos, when we reach item two, the floor is yours. Let us keep an eye on the time, because I would like to finish on schedule and capture every action item in the minutes.

Hi, this is Marina with a short recap of today's meeting for anyone who missed it. The outcome is clear: we will invest in the premium segment and protect the margin. Here are the action items. First, Carlos will prepare the regional breakdown and send it to the board by Friday. Second, I will update the forecast and circulate the minutes tomorrow morning. Third, the digital team will set a new deadline for the south region review, and we agreed to align on that date in the next call. The key takeaway is that everyone left the room on the same page. Thank you all for keeping your points short and clear. I will follow up if anything changes.
